series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Human Services Adult Training System
series_metadata.series_description: County provided social service programs for the elderly. Files include technical assistance information and correspondence relating to “meals on wheels” , transportation services and other social services.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 3 years in records center, and state and federal audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies are resolved. if of no historical value State Archives. ; Electronic: in office 3 years
